prompt: Create a professional 6-panel carousel titled 'Self-Healing Systems Need Governance'. Sequence: 1) Self-healing changes authority; 2) Remediation is an operational decision; 3) Boundaries define safe actions; 4) Escalation, rollback, and observability are required; 5) Governance enables responsible automation; 6) A system that can repair itself must know when not to. Use restrained technical design and clear system diagrams.
proof_boundaries: Do not claim measured reliability or incident-response improvements.
Do not imply unrestricted autonomous remediation is safe or mature.
Treat the content as a governance framework pending current technical verification.
